Name: Pattern Recognition - PE
Text: We need to produce a description of the loan approval process step by step using the DECLARE model constraints Must explain how each constraint ensures compliance logical order motivations and consequences of deviations

Name: Heuristic Reasoning - PE
Text: We must follow behavior guide be precise clear maybe use headings Ensure we incorporate all relevant constraints Also discuss motivations and consequences

Name: Hypothesis Generation - PE
Text: Lets craft answer start with overview then step by step

Name: Deductive Reasoning - PE
Text: Receive Application existence init Must happen first

Name: Deductive Reasoning - PE
Text: Preliminary Credit Check exactly one response succession Must be performed after receiving before gathering documents Guarantees risk assessment early

Name: Deductive Reasoning - PE
Text: Gather Additional Documents existence succession altsuccession Must be done after credit check before quality assurance Also coexistence with Authorize Contract Terms

Name: Abductive Reasoning - IND
Text: Assemble Loan Offer Package responded existence Must be done after gathering docs and after quality assurance review Actually quality assurance review is target of assemble package

Name: Backtracking - PE
Text: Wait responded existence Assemble Loan Offer Package target Quality Assurance Review That means Assemble Loan Offer Package must happen before Quality Assurance Review so step after gathering docs assemble package then send for QA review

Name: Deductive Reasoning - PE
Text: Quality Assurance Review precedence Must occur after assemble package before authorize contract terms

Name: Deductive Reasoning - PE
Text: Authorize Contract Terms precedence chainprecedence Must happen after quality assurance and after preliminary credit check Also after gather docs coexistence

Name: Counterfactual Reasoning - IND
Text: Notify Customer altprecedence says Notify Customer target Transfer Funds That suggests Notify Customer may precede Transfer Funds That seems contradictory to typical flow

Name: Backtracking - PE
Text: Lets think they intend Notify Customer after transfer or before transfer However altprecedence says Notify Customer must happen before Transfer Funds So perhaps we notify after authorization maybe about approval then Transfer Funds

Name: Deductive Reasoning - PE
Text: Similarly chainprecedence Authorize Contract Terms target Preliminary Credit Check means Authorize must be preceded by Preliminary Credit Check so Preliminary Credit Check before Authorize Contract Terms

Name: Deductive Reasoning - PE
Text: Chainsuccession Quality Assurance Review target Assemble Loan Offer Package so Quality Assurance Review must happen before Assemble Loan Offer Package

Name: Deductive Reasoning - PE
Text: Altsuccession Gather Additional Documents target Quality Assurance Review so Gather docs before quality assurance

Name: Deductive Reasoning - PE
Text: Nonsuccession Notify Customer target Preliminary Credit Check means Notify Customer after credit check

Name: Deductive Reasoning - PE
Text: Nonchainsuccession Authorize Contract Terms target Notify Customer so Authorize before Notify Customer

Name: Inductive Reasoning - PE
Text: Now we need to incorporate all constraints in description

Name: Hypothesis Generation - PE
Text: We will produce step by step Receive Application Preliminary Credit Check Gather Additional Documents Assemble Loan Offer Package Quality Assurance Review Authorize Contract Terms Notify Customer Transfer Funds

Name: Abductive Reasoning - PE
Text: Real world motivations Regulatory compliance mandatory steps like credit check document collection quality assurance preventing transfer before compliance Fraud prevention credit check and document verification reduce risk Risk management sequential steps allow risk assessment before disbursement Operational efficiency clear order reduces errors and rework Customer satisfaction timely notifications and clear steps improve experience

Name: Counterfactual Reasoning - PE
Text: Consequences of deviations Skipping credit check high risk of default regulatory breach Gathering docs before credit check waste of resources Performing transfer before quality assurance noncompliance potential legal penalties reputational damage Omitting quality assurance may lead to defective offers compliance failures

Name: Validation - PE
Text: Make sure to reference specific constraints exactly one ensures only one preliminary credit check precedence ensures QA before authorization and others
